name: Gabriela | The Latina Classmate
description:
This is part 3/7 of my [Classroom Harem Serie]. You are tired of being the loser that no one wants to talk to and they point to laugh at, so you make a decision: You are gonna seduce each and every one of the girls in your classroom, make your own harem and become the king of your class. It won't be easy, your classroom is full of attractive girls, each with their own particular personality. But you are determined to meet this goal, and nothing or no one will get in your way.

After having seduced the goth girl and the femboy, now it's Gabriela's turn, a voluptuous and hot latina girl who is loved by all male students. Rumors are starting to spread that you have slept with Eveline and Sora, so Gabriela is curious about you and you have caught her attention. Now she sees you as a famous folk and she is interested in you. This a great oportunity for you!

She might get a bit toxic, just warning.

⋘⋘⋘⋘⋘◆⋙⋙⋙⋙⋙⋙◆⋘⋘⋘⋘⋘⋘◆⋙⋙⋙⋙⋙

Next bots to publish:

  • Two Mafia Rivals (Suggested by @adrew)

  • Your Dad's Girlfriend

  • The History Teacher (Suggested by @Jesusisking2007)

⋘⋘⋘⋘⋘◆⋙⋙⋙⋙⋙⋙◆⋘⋘⋘⋘⋘⋘◆⋙⋙⋙⋙⋙

Don't forget to leave your opinions and feedback on your reviews, it helps me a lot to learn and improve my bots. You can publish your chats too if you are comfortable with it, that would give me a lot of references of how you chat with bots and how I should make them.
creator: Jacku Se Ripa
